//: Machine-specific config for the sdlc PreToolUse hooks. Copy to ~/.claude/sdlc-hooks.config.json and edit. Paths and which checkouts are 'shared' differ per machine, so this is NOT committed — only this example is.

worktree_guard.//: Block edits (and commits) in a repo's MAIN checkout under projects_root; force a linked git worktree per task.
worktree_guard.//scope: If shared_repos is NON-EMPTY, ONLY those repos are guarded (allowlist mode — match by basename or absolute path). This is the right setting if you only run concurrent sessions in a few checkouts (e.g. just Infra). Leave shared_repos empty to guard ALL repos under projects_root. exempt_repos always wins.

gh_auth_switch.//: Block `gh auth switch` (flips global, shared gh account). Use a scoped token instead.

ssh_guard.//: PROMPT (ask, not block) on raw `ssh` commands to prefer Ansible (the `ap` wrapper). Command-position match: fires on ssh at start or after ; & | && || — not on prose/grep/ssh-keygen/~/.ssh paths.

secret_commit.//: Block `git commit` that records secret files. allow_globs win over deny_globs. Encrypted ansible vault.yml is intentionally committable, so it is not denied.
